releases.description: ## Notes Explorer v2.7.0 🥳 | Folder view ### New Features 🎁 - **Folder View :** Show the children folder as cards and navigate the directories using these folder cards and top navigation bar. - Improved a lot of UI elements to reduce visual noise and give an aesthetic look. | #53 - Toggle search input field only when required | #55 - A new **RegEx** filter inside search filters to use the power of `regular expressions`. - Enhanced refresh on tab or window resize with smoother animation. - Real-time card content refresh on file edit | #36 ### Bug Fixes 🛠 - Align the loading animation and no-files messages to the center of the view. | Fixed ✅ ### Other Changes 🔎 - Renamed the `isEmpty` function to `pullContentWithoutFrontmatter` to return content without frontmatter. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/2.6.2...2.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 2.6.0 -->

# Notes Explorer v2.6.0 🥳 | Search Filters

![NOtesExplorerOfficialThumbnail-1x](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8b34d7ee-5f46-4b08-b6d7-1ae19021febb)

![NotesExplorerOfficialThumbnail-2-1x](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6de277fc-42d7-4008-81f3-1cacfe91142b)


> YouTube demo video : https://youtu.be/GEp1inE6H1I


## New Features 🎁

- **Search filters** : Apply filters on the view through the search bar. | #9 
- **Notes Explorer view share link** : Now store all your custom views using the view URI links and open the view from outside Obsidian.
- Store search history | #27 
- A ton of UI enhancements for phone screens | #20 
- **Note view modal** : A new way to open notes | #21 
- Two new settings to change the gutter size and surrounding gutter visibility | #22 
- A new action button to open page navigation bar on phones | #24 
- Display the page count in the footer and notes count in the header | #29 
- A new modal to get notes count statistics.
- A **folder suggestor** when entering folder path in the **exclude folders** setting.
- Few user-friendly messages when no files found.

## Bug Fixes 🛠

- Notes with only frontmatter are shown as blank cards. | Fixed ✅
- Multiple fixes as per #23 | Fixed ✅
- The color pickr is not working when `Highlightr` plugin is disabled. | Fixed ✅

## Other Changes 🔎

- A lot of huge optimizations in svelte store. Significantly improved the operations time.
- View will now automatically refresh whenever `allAllowedFiles` changes.
- `store.ts` file moved from **src/components** directory to **src** directory.
- **Modals** directory name changed to **modals**.
- A ton of more UI enhancements for the cards.




**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/2.5.2...2.6.0

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 2.6.0-beta-1 -->

## Notes Explorer v2.6.0-beta-1

### New Features

- **Search filters** : Apply filters on the view using the search functionality. | #9 
- Store search history | #27 
- UI enhancements for phone screens | #20 
- Two new settings to change the gutter size and surrounding gutter visibility | #22 
- Display the page count in the footer and notes count in the header | #29 
- A new way to open notes | #21 
- A new action button to open page navigation bar on phones | #24 
- Few messages when no files found.
- A folder suggestor when entering folder path in the **exclude folders** setting.

### Bug Fixes

- Notes with only frontmatter in them should be considered as empty notes.
- Multiple fixes as per #23
- The color pickr is not working when `Highlightr` plugin is disabled.

### Other Changes

- A lot of huge optimizations in svelte store.
- View will now automatically refresh whenever `allAllowedFiles` changes.
- `store.ts` file moved from **src/components** directory to **src** directory.
- **Modals** directory name changed to **modals**.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/2.5.2...2.6.0-beta-1

releases.description:
## Notes Explorer v2.5.0

![Pasted image 20250321175216](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8f888d34-d775-4692-aced-3b283421f277)


### New Features 🎁

- **Open notes explorer in left sidebar** : A new command to easily open notes explorer in left sidebar.
- **Open in same tab :** A new option for the *Open note layout* setting to open your notes in the same tab. (Only works if Notes Explorer is inside left sidebar)
- Changed the behaviour for opening note in right side tab. All the notes will open on the right side tab by re-using the same opened, right split tab, instead of splitting the view all the time. Read #13 and #14 .
- If you want the plugin to behave similar to File Explorer, use the **Open notes explorer in left sidebar** and you will be able to use *CTRL*, *CTRL+ALT* and *CTRL+ALT+SHIFT* shortcuts to open notes in different layouts.
- New setting to choose double click or single click to open the note from the card. #15
- Images will be now aligned to center inside the cards.


### Bug Fixes 🛠

- The height is too small when there is ony one or two rows (#6). Fixed ✅
- Checkboxes are flowing out of the cards. Fixed ✅
- The Notes explorer tab header do not shows the plugin icon correctly. Fixed ✅


### Other Changes 🔎

- Changed view name to `NotesExplorerView`.
- This plugin will use Obsidian-Typings from now onwards.
- Changes requested by ObsidianReviewBot for plugin submission in Obsidian Community.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/2.4.0...2.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 2.4.0 -->

## Notes Explorer v2.4.0

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/81f0a7b8-401c-4ebb-8cf4-023e4f4be9b7)

### Big New Features 🎁

- **Page View Mode**  
	- If you are not scrolling through many cards, you can use the plugin as usual. You will also see an indicator in the status bar to show how many cards you’ve scrolled. If scrolling through more than a thousand cards doesn’t cause Obsidian to freeze, and resizing the view still rearranges the cards properly, it means you have a powerful PC and may not need to enable this feature. (Still, take a note of the number, when you start feeling that, you shouldn't scroll beyond these many cards.)
	- To enable the new **Page View Mode**, toggle the feature in the settings. You can also set how many cards you want to see on a single page (default is 100). This is entirely up to you. On my laptop, I noticed lag when I set it to '1000,' so I usually keep it below that. (Choose a number below the limit you noted earlier.)  

- **Page Bar:** A new page bar has been added, which you can open by clicking on the <button>Page: #</button> button in the status bar. You can also use the left and right arrow buttons on either side of the page number to navigate between pages without opening the page bar.  

- **Hide Action Bar:** A new button in the board header has been added. If you’d like to hide the action bar and get a full-screen, distraction-free view, you can use this button.  

- Save button removed from color picker, so users can directly select the color and close the picker by clicking outside the picker pop-up.

- The tags in action bar has been made to scroll horizontally, to solve the various issue occurring earlier while accusing the tags.

- **Delete permanently** option removed for `deleted files` setting, since it was similar to **Move to system trash option**.

### Bug Fixes 🛠

- Footer background is only appearing on hover, when footer always visible setting is true. Fixed ✅
- Tag color indicator are not applied as per priority set in settings, when front matter has been selected as the tags location. Fixed ✅
- Filename in top-bar is not wrapping and flowing out of the card. Fixed ✅

### Other Changes 🔎

- Settings tab improved and organized with the new setting options.
- Styles of various old elements as well as new elements has been improved for visually appealing UI.
- Code optimized in store to use less store variables for faster updates.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/2.3.1...2.4.0

## Notes Explorer v2.3.0 🥳

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7bd56c76-79b9-4f26-b9a4-bd970cb6a652

### New Features 🎁

- **Hover preview for parent note:** Get a hove preview for the parent note when hovered over the footer of the card while holding <button>CTRL</button> key.
- **Interactions for note's content :** Get hover preview for the internal links from the note's content, as well as open the internal links directly from the card. Holding <button>CTRL</button> key is important for both the functionalities to work.
- New setting option to enable or disable the Interactions for the note's content.

### Bug Fixes 🛠

- Header/filename was hiding earlier when a fixed card height has been set. Fixed ✅
- Content in the card footer was not properly visible due to the blurred css style. Fixed ✅
- The font style of note metadata in Card's footer was not initially visible. Fixed ✅


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/2.2.0...2.3.0

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 2.2.0 -->

## Notes Explorer v2.2.0 🥳

![FixedCardsHeightThumbnail](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0325bf9b-1cbf-40d8-b2c0-f360c78497c4)

### New Big Features 🎁

- **Fixed Card Height :** The setting for `Max Card Height` has been changed to `Fixed Card Height`. This will help to get a gallery view instead of a Masonry view. (As can be seen in the first image)
- **Delete Confirmation popup** : A new popup window has been added so users don't accidentally delete the notes using the delete icon in the cared footer. See below image.
![Obsidian_MMzWkJd0Qg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/97776f75-4676-40db-ab36-f360f869fb99)

- New setting option for Note's Metadata selection.
- **Note's Metadata :** Now you can select which notes property you want to see inside the footer of the card instead of the original parent folder name. See below image for the available options which has been added. For front-matter optoin,  all the notes must have the front-matter tag, entered in the setting field.

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/44f924f6-5e6a-4bc3-a6bc-ad030aa9d6db)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9c1192e8-b553-4726-ab74-dc2025d6bb7e)

### Bug Fixes 🛠

- Footer color was earlier always showing white in both dark and white theme mode. Fixed ✅

### Other Changes 🔎

- New styles CSS added for the latest changes.



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/2.1.0...2.2.0

### New Features 🎁

- New icon for new plugin.
- New setting option to set the maximum number of lines you want to see in the card from your note. Default will always be 20 lines.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 2.0.0 -->

## Notes Explorer v2.0.0 🥳

Initially started as simple fork from the Cards View plugin, now has become a highly functional plugin in itself with a lot of new functionalities. I started integrating all these new features to explore vault efficiently. Although, now after hearing few suggestions from the users, I have decided to publish my own new plugin with all these new changes, as I presume, the author of the Cards View might not be interested in integrating all these new features. This Beta version will be now published with a new name : **Notes Explorer**.


### What's changed ?

The old beta version will now be released on the Obsidian plugin marketplace with a new name : **Notes Explorer**.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/obsidian-notes-explorer/compare/1.14.0...2.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 1.14.0 -->

## Cards View (Beta) v1.14.0 🥳

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/acc82221-dc66-45c4-9d32-413444b5fb35)


### New Big Features 🎁

- UI/UX for the **Tag color indicator** has been enhanced to give best experience for configuring the colors.
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/820344c1-0ef7-4209-a294-37756326ac30)

- New setting option to select the **Tag color indicator type**

- The functionality for the new **Tag color indicator type** = **Card's sidebar** has been implemented, as can be seen in the first image. This specific feature has been integrated because, the rendered cards are not simple cards like **Google Notes** or other simple cards. In Obsidian, the markdown is rendered using various styles for all the different types of elements, such as headings, blockquotes, codeblocks, etc. And their colors varies with different themes too. To be able to view the content in the cards properly, users can use this new option to see the tag color indicator in a new way.

### Bug Fixes 🛠

- Multiple bugs with color picker such as, alpha set to 0 by default, the rgba values are not stored as integers. Fixed ✅

### Other Changes 🔎

- Styles for the new setting elements improved.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/cards-view-plugin-beta/compare/1.13.2...1.14.0

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 1.13.0 -->

## Cards View (Beta) v1.13.0 🥳

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1d287281-4cae-499d-9d60-ba816e6ba86e

### New Big Features 🎁

- **Exclude Folders :** Now you can add folders in setting to exclude all notes from that folders.
- **Folder specific Cards view :** New menu option in file menu to only see notes from a particular folder.
- **Cards view on folder click :** Click on the folder from the file-explorer to see the Cards view with all the parent notes. Enable this feature from settings.
- **Read Sub-folders :** Using this filter, you can now able to see all the files from the sub-folders as well, when folder specific view is active.
- A folder tag will be shown in the top bar as an indicator, when a folder specific view is active.
- Organized the sort menu with sections headings.
- **Refresh on Resize :** Now the masonry view will refresh on layout/tab resize.

### Bug Fixes 🛠

- Excalidraw files were shown with last release fixed.
- Tag based card background color were not working on Obsidian start, fixed.


### Other Changes

- Optimized the build.
- Organized code.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/cards-view-plugin-beta/compare/1.12.1...1.13.0

## Cards View (Beta) v1.11.0🥳

### New Features 🆕
- Folder name will be shown as **Vault** for the files in root folder.
- Double click to open the file. Earlier, even false click to the cards would accidentally use to open the note. Now, double click to open the note.
- New setting option to **Hide** the folder name, to get an Aesthetic look for the cards.
- **Cards Color :** Now, set your custom colors to the note cards based on the tags present in them. Shout out to @abasse for the PR : https://github.com/jillro/obsidian-cards-view-plugin/pull/8

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2186945b-594f-4ff0-8275-05f180f1523d)


### Bug Fixes 🛠

- Third delete file option was not working, fixed.
- Earlier filename for the files in root folder was still visible even after changing the **Title display mode** to title, fixed : [#18](https://github.com/jillro/obsidian-cards-view-plugin/issues/18)
- There was no name for folder in footer for the files located in root folder.
- Header and footer now blends well with the card.

### Other Changes

- Code organization for optimized build.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/cards-view-plugin-beta/compare/1.10.1...1.11.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 1.8.1 -->

## What's changed 🥳

This release it created for the user who want to install the new features which are requested in the PR to the original [**Cards View** plugin](https://github.com/jillro/obsidian-cards-view-plugin). Check the [README](https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/cards-view-plugin-beta), to see how to install this plugin.

### New Features ⚓

- Setting option to hide the delete button.

- The buttons in the footer are only shown on card hover, to give a clean look for all the cards.
![Obsidian_v2DloP2YAZ](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/459c5936-567b-4332-ae55-83058ecd189d)

### Bug Fixes 🛠

- I don't know about other users, but I was facing an issue, where the overflow was unset for the `view-content` div which is Obsidian's parent div for **View**, in which the *Card View* gets rendered. Hence, I was not able to scroll. I have moved the scrolling logic inside the `card-container`, so only the section of cards is scrolling, and the header will be sticky on the top.


### Other changes

- Updated the project structure, moved everything inside src/ directory, let's follow a standard structure.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tu2-atmanand/cards-view-plugin-beta/compare/1.8.0...1.8.1
